case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CHEAPER AUTO REPAIR

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEAPER AUTO REPAIR
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO CHEAPER AUTO REPAIR OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEAPER AUTO REPAIR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $765.76 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CHEAPER AUTO REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEAPER AUTO REPAIR $825.76 PRINCIPAL, $81.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $907.26, DEFENDANT FIAILED TO APPEAR. JUDGMENT INCLUDES STATUTORY PENALTIES PER CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE SECTION 1719. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
